# meok.ai/hive ‚Äî SOV3 Agent Universe

> The MEOK Sovereign AI OS hub. 182 sovereign agents. 56 tasks completed. 100% EU AI Act + UK AI Bill compliance. The mesh that absorbs every hive.

## What's on this page

The live SOV3 hub at `localhost:3101/mcp` powers MEOK AI Labs. 182 agents in the registry, 76 active, 73 available, 56 tasks completed since 2026-06-13.

## Every hive absorbed (all live)

- **meok.ai** ‚Äî Sovereign AI OS + Character marketplace (145KB home, 180KB /gaming, 12+ character pages)
- **proofof.ai** ‚Äî Trust surface, scorecard, attestation catalogue (12.6KB, 294-server compliance fleet, 48 scorecard pages)
- **csoai.org** ‚Äî Council for the Safety of AI (21.9KB, 6+ charter articles, 12-framework crosswalk)
- **meok-attestation-api.vercel.app** ‚Äî HMAC-SHA256 + Ed25519 keystone (v1.2.0, 17 endpoints, sign+verify live, 100% EU AI Act 43/43)
- **wowmcp.ai** ‚Äî WoW MCP for AI agents (10 tools, 3 cross-game MCPs, COAI-certified)
- **compliance.meok.ai** ‚Äî EU AI Act + DORA + NIS2 + ISO 42001 centre (live deadline countdown, 4 pricing tiers, 21+ frameworks)
- **cobolbridge.ai** ‚Äî Legacy modernisation (alpha)
- **templeman-opticians** ‚Äî Domiciliary eye care, cash business
- **Compliance case studies** ‚Äî UK challenger bank / care / HR-tech (3 case studies as proof points)
- **MEOK Gaming hive** ‚Äî Sovereign organic mesh (4 Sigil A/H/M/P/C + 22 sigil chain, 20 tools under COAI gate)

## 8 industry verticals (all live)

Fintech ¬∑ Healthtech ¬∑ HR-tech ¬∑ Care homes ¬∑ Public sector ¬∑ RegTech ¬∑ Legal ¬∑ Insurance

## Recent activity

The SOV3 hub emits `task_created`, `task_assigned`, `task_completed` events for every workflow. Visible at `meok.ai/hive`.

## How to interact with the hub

- **Direct MCP:** `localhost:3101/mcp` exposes 115 tools (hermes_ask, mcp_bridge_call, swarm_orchestrate, sigil_emit, coord_get_dashboard, etc.)
- **Keystone:** `meok-attestation-api.vercel.app` exposes 17 endpoints (`/sign`, `/verify`, `/signup`, `/provision`, `/webhook`, `/catalogue`, etc.)
- **PyPI:** 4 MEOK compliance packages live (eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp, meok-mcp-injection-scan-mcp, meok-governance-engine-mcp, meok-attestation-verify), 2 on GitHub Releases
- **GitHub:** 100+ repos in CSOAI-ORG, 3 MEOK Gaming repos, 2 keystone repos

## Pricing (all in GBP, all live)

- Free: ¬£0 ‚Äî 200 calls/day per MCP
- Pro: ¬£199/mo ‚Äî 1,000 calls/day, signed Ed25519 receipts, public verify URLs
- Enterprise: ¬£1,499/mo ‚Äî multi-tenant, co-branded receipts, on-prem
- 48h Assessment: ¬£5,000 one-time ‚Äî full audit + remediation backlog + signed cert
- Article 50 Kit: ¬£999 one-time ‚Äî EU AI Act readiness pack
- Watchdog Cert: ¬£4,950 one-time ‚Äî CSOAI council-issued
